summary: Iteration 4 testing complete: Chat history persistence, session management, New Chat button, Gossip mode, and sessionStorage persistence. Fixed 1 bug (duplicate session key error on auto-create). All 13 backend tests pass. All frontend flows verified.

issues: Console warnings about CSS border shorthand/non-shorthand mixing during vibe switching

existing_user.note: User with chat history and custom characters

seed_data_creation: Used existing test user chartest@test.com. Created multiple test sessions and characters during testing that were cleaned up.

chat_sessions_api_get.details: GET /api/chat/sessions?vibe_id=default returns sessions list with session_id, vibe_id, title fields

chat_sessions_api_post.details: POST /api/chat/sessions creates new chat session. Returns session object.

chat_history_api.details: GET /api/chat/history/{session_id} returns message history with role, content, mode, timestamp

chat_auto_create_session.details: POST /api/chat auto-creates session if doesn't exist. Fixed duplicate key error.

character_deletion_cascade.details: DELETE /api/characters/{id} also deletes all chat sessions for that character

gossip_mode_no_history.details: Gossip mode with force_vault=true does NOT save chat history. Returns is_vault=true.

session_storage_persistence.details: rv_view and rv_sessionId saved to sessionStorage. After page reload, authenticated user goes directly to chat (no splash).

splash_unauthenticated_only.details: Splash screen shows only for unauthenticated users

new_chat_button_re_mode.details: New Chat button visible in sidebar only for RE mode, NOT for character mode

new_chat_creates_session.details: Clicking New Chat changes session ID in sessionStorage

vibe_switching.details: Switching between RE and custom characters works. Chat history loads correctly for each vibe.

onboarding_auto_trigger.details: When entering chat, welcome message appears automatically. Onboarding conversation starts for new users.

bug_fixed.issue: E11000 duplicate key error on chat session auto-create
bug_fixed.root_cause: create_chat_session() tried to insert duplicate session_id when session already exists with different vibe_id
bug_fixed.fix: Added check for existing session by session_id before insert, with race condition handling

context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 4 features verified. Test user chartest@test.com has chat history. SessionStorage keys are rv_view, rv_sessionId, rv_activeVibe. New Chat button only visible in RE mode (vibe_id=default). Gossip mode uses force_vault=true so no history is saved. Database function create_chat_session now handles duplicates gracefully.
